items.title: [DC] nanami_carocontrolmeta@🔸有問必答┊official-q-a: Hi, I’d like to talk about something I find very worrying at least for me as it
items.summary:
Hi, I’d like to talk about something I find very worrying at least for me as it has a major impact on this new type of character, who have a lot of base stats. Well, the  The point is that they really need their base attack card and base shield card stats to be adjusted to at least 30 or 35 in order to be truly effective in combat. I’m not just saying this because I want them to be buffed not at all  I’ve tried Arachne and Vortice loads of times in loads of content where the base Aliemus is increased for the player, or they’re simply not allowed to play certain cards on some turns, and they struggle a lot with the recharge it sounds Whilst these characters have mechanics to charge their ultimates, if you think about it, Arachne needs to sacrifice her special card to generate energy, and Vortice absolutely needs her card which grants her a whole lot of Aliemus to get anywhere near her ultimate, something that will often be tricky, as Arachne’s special cards at least grant random Aliemus, and Vortice’s card without the frame won’t be enough to fill the entire ultimate. And here’s my other point: these characters’ OEs are very difficult to fill unless you have an external source to help you do so. this shouldn’t be a problem for characters that ‘recharge their own energy’, and soon Saya will be released, a character who directly removes an easy ultimate recharge mechanic, making ultimate recharge even more complicated. I simply think they should give more thought to the energy return for these characters, as 10 Aliemus for a character with 100 base Aliemus is not the same as 10 Aliemus for a character with 200 base energy. this doesn’t represent even the slightest real improvement to the ultimate; I hope they take this into account.
[附件: IMG_20260529_040326.jpg]
items.author: nanami_carocontrolmeta

items.title: [DC] polkarain@🔸綜合討論: 一觉醒来，全球忘却玩家水平下降1000倍，鲸鱼竟被称为t0输出！
items.summary:
一觉醒来，全球忘却玩家水平下降1000倍，鲸鱼竟被称为t0输出！
  └ xianrenwurao: ~~怎麼不是圖魯~~
  └ heikwok: 一覺醒來，讓鯨魚轉職去當世界級偶像
託乎瓦波降臨地球那一天，鯨魚早已通過直播，讓全球粉絲揮動應援棒通過視為打擊疊加海量傷害
就連一刻都沒有為於麗埃特的倒下而哀悼，巨大眼珠大人降臨後被星天之鯨瞬間吞噬☝️ 😼
